temporal_description: A medium shot focuses on a man in a dark suit and tie, standing in what appears to be a dimly lit office or command center. He has a serious, stern expression and looks slightly off-camera. In the background, other people are present; one person in a blue shirt with "FCCB" on the back is visible on the left, and another person sits at a computer in the lower right. A large board covered in photos is on the wall behind him. The Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in the upper left corner of the screen. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man in a light-colored shirt, seen in profile. He is holding a phone to his ear, his expression intense and focused. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner. The audio presents a tense and urgent exchange between two men in what sounds like a quiet, indoor environment. The first man speaks in a low, slightly exasperated tone, as if questioning someone's lack of knowledge or preparedness. He asks, "You don't even know the broadcast channel?" The shot returns to the man in the suit, who maintains his serious, unblinking gaze. The camera angle and setting are the same as in the first shot, with the other individuals and the photo-covered board visible in the dimly lit background. The "风行网" text is still visible. The second man responds with a sharp, commanding voice, his tone serious and direct as he asks, "Did you say it?" The first man then quickly and clearly recites a series of numbers, "456855," in a rapid, business-like manner. The second man immediately cuts him off with a loud, forceful, and demanding shout, "Say it again!" The scene is devoid of any background music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the intense and slightly confrontational dialogue.
